title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. suaveolens
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. suaveolens, also known as woodland forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Myosotis sylvatica subsp. suaveolens include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
